association.title: Berner-Architekten-Treffen Association
association.history: Since January 23, 2009, the Berner Architekten-Treffen has been organized by the Berner-Architekten-Treffen association.
association.mission: The Berner Architekten-Treffen has been a meeting platform for IT professionals interested in architecture topics since 2005.
association.platform: Through practical presentations and opportunities for in-depth discussion of current issues as well as direct contacts between companies from different industries, the Berner Architekten Treffen offers an excellent platform for the exchange of ideas and experiences.

organizers.title: Organizing Committee
organizers.description: The Berner-Architekten-Treffen is supported in terms of content and organization by a dedicated organizing committee:

contact.description: For questions, suggestions and comments, you can contact any of the members directly or reach out to us:
